descriptionTemplate: Randomly deal [Damage:Arg1] {Pierce DMG} 3 times, {Stealing} [Arg2] {STR⯆} each time. Choose 1 non-Derived Command Card in hand that does not have {Exhaust}, {Rondino}, or {Crescendo}, and add {Rondino} to it. If there are no cards in your hand which qualify, deal DMG 3 more times.
